scope: Saved-artifact report of what the Agent layer adds on top of parser Markdown/content_list artifacts.

rows.task: 找出财报中需要复核的异常或风险信号，列出来源证据和建议处理动作。
找出财报中与上一期相比增长最快的项目，计算变化幅度，并给出证据。
解析合同 PDF，抽取条款、日期、风险和质量日志
处理跨页财报表格，合并上下文，检查小计和总计，并输出需要人工复核的差异。
找出财报中与上一期相比增长最快的项目，计算变化幅度，并列出证据。
解析 OCR 噪声合同，抽取合同编号、双方和日期；如果有乱码，先清理后再接受。
识别合同条款中的甲方、乙方、义务、例外条件和来源证据。
把流程图文档拆成步骤、责任角色、输入输出、异常触发条件，并标记需要视觉复核的节点。
解析财报密集数字表格，抽取报告日期、公司名称、关键数字、合计行和处理建议。
分析低质量 OCR 文本，抽取日期、异常温度、编码噪声和处理建议。
结构化合同条款，抽取合同编号、签署日期、章节条款、异常处理和处理建议。
解析工艺流程说明，抽取流程步骤、关键参数、异常节点和处理建议。
清洗网页巡检日报，抽取日期、异常数量、异常表格和处理建议。
Parse a cross-page-style financial control pack, extract document id, owner, tables, subtotal/total evidence, risks, recommendations, trace, and retrieval chunks.
Parse an OCR-noisy contract scan review, clean mojibake fragments, preserve initial quality issues, extract contract metadata, risk table, recommendations, trace, and retrieval chunks.
Parse an industry standard compliance matrix, extract standard id, owner, requirements, severity, exception rules, quality logs, and retrieval chunks.
Parse an incident workflow report, extract incident id, timeline, fallback actions, risks, recommendations, recovery verification targets, trace, and retrieval chunks.
检查财报表格总计是否一致，并标记人工复核项。
解析稀疏 PDF；记录 OCR 重试失败后的保底结果。
解析稀疏 PDF；初始文本过短时切到 OCR。
解析 PDF，并要求字段能追溯到页级来源。
清理 OCR 噪声合同并保留质量问题。
启用大模型预调度和复核，解析财报 HTML，抽取报告日期、公司名称、合计数字，检查表格总计并给出可验证证据。

Parse the full public NIST AI RMF 1.0 PDF with long-document chunk orchestration; extract publication identity, framework functions, section structure, quality issues, trace, and retrieval chunks. Page range: 1-20.

Parse the full public NIST AI RMF 1.0 PDF with long-document chunk orchestration; extract publication identity, framework functions, section structure, quality issues, trace, and retrieval chunks. Page range: 21-40.

Parse the full public NIST AI RMF 1.0 PDF with long-document chunk orchestration; extract publication identity, framework functions, section structure, quality issues, trace, and retrieval chunks. Page range: 41-48.
Parse a cross-page contract PDF, extract contract number, effective date, compliance clauses, service-level terms, exception handling, and traceable retrieval chunks.
Parse a complex financial PDF, extract tables, numeric facts, total rows, audit notes, quality logs, and retrieval chunks.
解析扫描版中文 PDF，输出结构化文本、页级内容块、OCR 质量日志和检索导出
Parse an engineering workflow PDF with a flow diagram, execution matrix, findings, recommendations, quality logs, and retrieval chunks.
Parse a Word standard review packet, extract clauses, compliance table, dates, risks, recommendations, quality logs, recovery decision, and retrieval chunks.
Parse a PowerPoint workflow review deck, extract slide-level text, execution matrix, risks, recommendations, quality logs, recovery decision, and retrieval chunks.
Parse the public CDC VIS instruction PDF, extract instruction title, responsible agency, legal-use statements, quality issues, trace, and retrieval chunks.
Parse a public IRS W-4 PDF form, extract form title, department, structured sections, form tables, quality issues, trace, and retrieval chunks.
Parse Microsoft 2024 Annual Report PDF from SEC, extract company identity, annual report signals, financial sections, tables, quality issues, trace, and retrieval chunks.
Parse the public NIST AI RMF 1.0 PDF, extract publication identity, section structure, framework functions, quality issues, trace, and retrieval chunks.
Parse the contract PDF, let the LLM preplanner define schema and recovery policy, use online API first, and automatically fallback to local CLI when page provenance is missing.

boundaries: This is not a third-party parser benchmark and does not claim higher OCR/parser accuracy than raw MinerU.
It compares saved parser artifacts against saved Agent-layer audit, validation, recovery, and export fields.
Offline agent_decision_cases are counted separately from live LLM traces.
Controlled failure_recovery_cases are fault-injection evidence, not live OCR/network/GPU evidence.
